metadata.name: 肉漫屋
metadata.description: 肉漫屋 - 成人漫画网站（繁体中文），需要科学上网
metadata.author: ManXia Team (移植自 keiyoushi)

network.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

popular.description: 獲取熱門漫畫（首頁熱門區塊）

actions.code: (() => { const targetRegex = /正熱門|今日最佳|本週熱門/; const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); const sections = document.querySelectorAll('div.px-1 > div'); sections.forEach(section => { const header = section.querySelector(':scope > *:first-child'); if (!header || !targetRegex.test(header.textContent)) return; section.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\(\'([^']+)\'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } if (title && slug) entries.push({ id: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();

filter.description: 篩選漫畫（狀態：全部/連載中/已完結）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取篩選結果漫畫列表

latest.description: 獲取最新更新（首頁最近更新區塊）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); const sections = document.querySelectorAll('div.px-1 > div'); sections.forEach(section => { const header = section.querySelector(':scope > *:first-child'); if (!header || !header.textContent.includes('最近更新')) return; section.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\(\'([^']+)\'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } if (title && slug) entries.push({ id: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取最近更新區塊漫畫

actions.code: (() => { const page = ({{page}} || 1) - 1; const term = encodeURIComponent('{{query}}'); return '{{baseUrl}}/search?term=' + term + '&page=' + page; })();
actions.description: 構建搜尋URL（page 從 0 開始）

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取搜尋結果漫畫列表

actions.code: (() => { const clean = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const img = document.querySelector('div.basis-2\\/5 img'); const rows = Array.from(document.querySelector('div.basis-3\\/5')?.children || []).map(el => clean(el.textContent)); const detail = { title: rows[0] || '', cover: img?.getAttribute('src') || '', author: '', status: 'unknown', genre: '', description: '', updateTime: '' }; const intro = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('p')).find(p => clean(p.textContent).startsWith('簡介')); if (intro) detail.description = clean(intro.textContent).replace(/^簡介[:：]/, '').trim(); const genres = []; rows.forEach(row => { if (row.startsWith('作者')) { detail.author = clean(row.replace(/^作者[:：]/, '')); } else if (row.startsWith('狀態')) { const value = clean(row.replace(/^狀態[:：]/, '')); if (value.includes('連載')) detail.status = 'ongoing'; else if (value.includes('完結')) detail.status = 'completed'; } else if (row.startsWith('地區')) { const value = clean(row.replace(/^地區[:：]/, '')); if (value) genres.push(value); } else if (row.startsWith('標籤')) { const value = clean(row.replace(/^標籤[:：]/, '')); if (value) genres.push(...value.split(',').map(item => clean(item)).filter(Boolean)); } const match = row.match(/\b\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4}\b/); if (match) detail.updateTime = match[0]; }); detail.genre = genres.join(', '); return JSON.stringify(detail); })();
actions.description: 提取漫畫詳情（標題/封面/作者/狀態/標籤/簡介/更新日期）

actions.code: (() => { const clean = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); let date = ''; const rows = Array.from(document.querySelector('div.basis-3\\/5')?.children || []).map(el => clean(el.textContent)); for (let i = rows.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { const match = rows[i].match(/\b(\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{4})\b/); if (match) { date = match[1]; break; } } const chapters = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(a => { const href = a.getAttribute('href') || ''; const match = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)\/(\d+)/); if (!match) return; const key = match[1] + '/' + match[2]; if (seen.has(key)) return; seen.add(key); const num = parseInt(match[2], 10); const title = Number.isFinite(num) ? ('第' + (num + 1) + '話') : ('第' + match[2] + '話'); const chapter = { id: key, title, date }; chapters.push(chapter); }); chapters.reverse(); return JSON.stringify(chapters); })();
actions.description: 提取章節列表（去重開始閱讀入口，chapterId=slug/num）

getPageList.description: 获取章节图片列表（RSC imageUrl）

actions.code: (async () => { let chapter = '{{chapterId}}'; if (chapter.startsWith('http')) { try { chapter = new URL(chapter).pathname; } catch (e) {} } chapter = chapter.replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (chapter.startsWith('books/')) chapter = chapter.replace(/^books\//, ''); const response = await fetch('{{baseUrl}}/books/' + chapter, { headers: { rsc: '1' }, credentials: 'include', cache: 'no-store' }); const text = await response.text(); const regex = /"imageUrl":"([^"]+)"/g; const pages = []; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(text)) !== null) { pages.push({ index: pages.length, url: match[1] }); } return JSON.stringify(pages); })();
actions.description: 通过 RSC 请求提取 imageUrl 图片列表

directSearch.description: 直達搜尋（輸入 slug 或 /books/ 連結）

actions.code: (() => { const q = ('{{query}}' || '').trim(); let slug = q; const m1 = q.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); if (m1) slug = m1[1]; // 兼容完整 URL try { if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(q)) { const u = new URL(q); const m2 = (u.pathname || '').match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?#]+)/); if (m2) slug = m2[1]; } } catch (e) {} const result = { type: 'detail', manga: { id: '/books/' + slug, title: '', url: '{{baseUrl}}/books/' + slug, cover: '' }, error: null }; return JSON.stringify(result); })();
actions.description: 解析 slug 並返回 detail（後續由 getMangaDetail 處理）

actions.code: (() => { const page = ({{page}} || 1) - 1; const term = encodeURIComponent('{{tagId}}'); return '{{baseUrl}}/search?term=' + term + '&page=' + page; })();

actions.description: 導航到標籤搜尋結果頁

actions.code: (() => { const entries = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/books/"]').forEach(el => { const href = el.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/books\/([^\/\s?]+)/); if (!m) return; const slug = m[1]; if (seen.has(slug)) return; seen.add(slug); const titleEl = el.querySelector('div.truncate'); const title = titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : ''; if (!title) return; const bgEl = el.querySelector('[style*="background-image"]'); let cover = ''; if (bgEl) { const s = bgEl.getAttribute('style') || ''; const cm = s.match(/url\('([^']+)'\)|url\("([^"]+)"\)|url\(([^)]+)\)/); cover = cm ? (cm[1] || cm[2] || cm[3] || '') : ''; } entries.push({ id: '/books/' + slug, title, cover, author: '', genre: '' }); }); return JSON.stringify(entries); })();
actions.description: 提取標籤搜尋結果漫畫列表

changes: 初始版本，從 Kotlin 移植至 ManXia JSON 格式
支持熱門、最新、搜尋、篩選（連載狀態）功能
支持漫畫詳情與章節列表（根據 /books/{slug}/{num} 解析）
支持圖片列表（RSC XHR + imageUrl 正規對比）
支持圖片解擾演算法（roumanwu / md5_last_byte_mod10_plus5）
